skillFeat.name: Student of the Canon
skillFeat.desc: Attempt Religion checks to Recall Knowledge about your or any other faith. Critical failures only fail normally.

skillFeat.name: Experienced Smuggler
skillFeat.desc: When you Conceal an item, treat your Stealth as if you rolled 10 or higher.

skillFeat.name: Forager
skillFeat.desc: Subsist in wild on a success provides food for yourself + 2 (or 4 on crit success).

skillFeat.name: Intimidating Glare
skillFeat.desc: You can Demoralize with a fierce stare without needing a shared language.

skillFeat.name: Courtly Graces
skillFeat.desc: Use Society to pretend to be a noble or navigate courtly etiquette.

skillFeat.name: Underwater Marauder
skillFeat.desc: Not flat-footed in water; can use bludgeoning/slashing weapons normally underwater.

skillFeat.name: Assurance
skillFeat.desc: In a chosen skill, treat checks as if you rolled a 10 (no roll).

skillFeat.name: Dubious Knowledge
skillFeat.desc: On a failed Recall Knowledge, learn one true and one false piece of info.
